emails.subject: Acceptance Test for FCEL
emails.body: Acceptance Test for FCEL Kay, I am gathering responses to Interrogatories from the CT AG, CL&P, UI and so= me=20 enviro group called Environment Northeast regarding our fuel cell filing wi= th=20 the DPUC. Can you help me answer the following questions? And if you can,= =20 will you? Ultimately, we want to respond with as little information as=20 necessary to answer the exact question and to offier nothing else to them. =20 Usual stuff. =20 Thanks, Heather EN-1. Describe the =01&acceptance test=018 referred to on page 3 of your te= stimony,=20 including performance standards and the period of time over which they will= =20 be measured. EN-12 Please provide copies of any technical, engineering or other reports= =20 developed by or on behalf of CRRA concerning this project or the use of fue= l=20 cells. I've asked Steve Plauche and Scott Healy to answer this too so answer only= =20 if you know anything different. I very much appreciate it! =20
